&lt;!DOCTYPE html&gt;
&lt;html lang=&quot;el&quot;&gt;
&lt;head&gt;
&lt;meta charset=&quot;UTF-8&quot;&gt;
&lt;meta name=&quot;viewport&quot; content=&quot;width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover&quot;&gt;
&lt;title&gt;Gov.gr Wallet&lt;/title&gt;
&lt;meta name=&quot;apple-mobile-web-app-capable&quot; content=&quot;yes&quot;&gt;
&lt;meta name=&quot;apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style&quot; content=&quot;black-translucent&quot;&gt;
&lt;meta name=&quot;apple-mobile-web-app-title&quot; content=&quot;Wallet G.L.&quot;&gt;
&lt;meta name=&quot;theme-color&quot; content=&quot;#0a1c4a&quot;&gt;
&lt;link rel=&quot;apple-touch-icon&quot; href=&quot;helpfull/govwallet_icon.png&quot;&gt;
&lt;style&gt;
@import url(&#x27;https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&amp;display=swap&#x27;);

*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
html,body{
  width:100%;min-height:100%;
  font-family:&#x27;Noto Sans&#x27;,&#x27;Helvetica Neue&#x27;,Arial,sans-serif;
  background:#0a1c4a;
  color:#fff;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}
body{
  background-image:url(&#x27;data:image/jpeg;base64,&#x27;);
  background-size:cover;
  background-position:center top;
  background-attachment:fixed;
  background-repeat:no-repeat;
  padding-bottom:calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px) + 24px);
}

/* TOP BAR */
.topbar{
  display:flex;align-items:center;
  padding:calc(env(safe-area-inset-top,0px) + 14px) 14px 12px;
  gap:6px;
}
.tb-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;}
.tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:auto;}
.menu-btn{
  width:30px;height:30px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:transparent;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0;
}
.menu-btn svg{width:26px;height:26px;}
.brand{
  font-size:28px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-1px;line-height:1;
  color:#fff;white-space:nowrap;
}
.brand .dot{color:#fff;}
.brand .gr{color:#00b2e3;}
.mai-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.mai-wrap .bot{
  width:34px;height:34px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  position:relative;flex-shrink:0;
}
.mai-wrap .bot svg{width:34px;height:34px;}
.mai-text{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.6px;line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;}
.mai-text .ai{color:#fff;}
.mai-text .gov{color:#00b2e3;}
.mail-btn{
  width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  border:none;cursor:pointer;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;
}
.mail-btn svg{width:20px;height:20px;color:#0a1c4a;}
.mail-btn::after{
  content:&quot;&quot;;position:absolute;top:2px;right:3px;
  width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#7ed957;
  border:1.5px solid #0a1c4a;
}

/* CARD CAROUSEL */
.carousel-wrap{
  position:relative;
  margin-top:10px;
}
.carousel{
  display:flex;
  gap:16px;
  overflow-x:auto;
  scroll-snap-type:x mandatory;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
  padding:6px 0 0 16px;
  scrollbar-width:none;
  scroll-padding-left:16px;
}
.carousel::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}

.card{
  flex:0 0 350px;
  scroll-snap-align:center;
  border-radius:16px;
  background:#fff;
  overflow:hidden;
  cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.30);
  display:grid;
  grid-template-rows:91px 83px;
  height:174px;
  position:relative;
  isolation:isolate;
}
.card .stripe{
  position:relative;
  padding:16px 135px 8px 20px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.card .stripe::after{
  content:&quot;&quot;;position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:url(&#x27;data:image/png;base64,&#x27;);
  background-position:left center;
  background-size:100% 100%;
  background-repeat:no-repeat;
  pointer-events:none;
}
.card.id .stripe{background:#5b92ca;}
.card.dl .stripe{background:#c68889;}
.card .ctitle{
  font-size:20px;font-weight:500;color:#fff;
  text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.10);
  position:relative;z-index:1;
  line-height:1.15;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.card .cbody{
  background:#fff;
  padding:10px 135px 8px 20px;
  position:relative;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-start;
}
.card .cnum{
  font-size:34px;font-weight:800;color:#0e0e0e;
  letter-spacing:.2px;line-height:1;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.card .cdate{
  font-size:14px;font-weight:400;color:#9a9a9a;
  margin-top:6px;
}
.card .cphoto{
  position:absolute;
  right:19px;
  top:23px;
  width:104px;height:126px;
  border-radius:12px;
  background:#eee;
  overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.30);
  z-index:2;
}
.card .cphoto img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}

/* DOTS */
.dots{
  display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;
  margin-top:16px;
}
.dot{
  width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.40);
  transition:background .18s;
}
.dot.active{background:#fff;}

/* SEARCH FIELD */
.field-pn{
  margin:20px 18px 0;
  border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.55);
  border-radius:14px;
  background:transparent;
  padding:18px 20px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  color:#fff;font-size:18px;font-weight:400;
}
.field-pn .eye{
  width:24px;height:24px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);
}

/* SECTION HEADER */
.sec-head{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:26px 18px 12px;
}
.sec-title{font-size:17px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;}
.sec-link{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;
  font-size:15px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;
}
.sec-link svg{width:14px;height:14px;color:#00b2e3;}

/* MY WALLET ROW */
.wallet-row{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
  gap:14px;
  padding:0 16px;
}
.wallet-tile{
  aspect-ratio:1/1;
  border-radius:14px;
  background:rgba(13,30,82,.55);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  position:relative;
}
.wallet-tile.first{
  background:transparent;
  border:none;
  overflow:visible;
}
.wallet-tile .ticket-ic{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block;border-radius:14px;}
.wallet-tile .tlabel{
  position:absolute;
  top:calc(100% + 8px);left:0;right:0;
  text-align:center;
  font-size:14px;color:#fff;font-weight:400;
}

.wallet-spacer{height:30px;}

/* INBOX HORIZONTAL */
.h-scroll{
  display:flex;gap:12px;
  overflow-x:auto;padding:0 18px 4px;
  scroll-snap-type:x proximity;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
  scrollbar-width:none;
}
.h-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
.ibcard{
  flex:0 0 47%;
  background:rgba(20,50,120,.40);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.30);
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:18px 16px 14px;
  min-height:150px;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:space-between;
  color:#fff;
  scroll-snap-align:start;
}
.ibcard .ibtitle{
  font-size:15px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.32;
  color:#fff;
}
.ibcard .ibts{
  font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);
  margin-top:10px;
  border-top:0;
}

/* SERVICES HORIZONTAL */
.svc-scroll{
  display:flex;gap:12px;
  overflow-x:auto;padding:0 18px 4px;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
  scrollbar-width:none;
  scroll-snap-type:x proximity;
}
.svc-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
.svccard{
  flex:0 0 47%;
  background:rgba(20,50,120,.30);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:16px 14px;
  min-height:130px;
  font-size:15px;color:#fff;line-height:1.35;font-weight:400;
  scroll-snap-align:start;
}

/* FAB */
.fab{
  position:fixed;
  right:18px;
  bottom:calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px) + 24px);
  width:62px;height:62px;border-radius:50%;
  background:#22b4e6;color:#fff;
  border:3px solid #1a8fb8;
  cursor:pointer;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.40);
  z-index:50;
}
.fab svg{width:30px;height:30px;}

/* FOOTER */
.footer{
  text-align:center;
  padding:30px 18px 4px;
  font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);
}
.footer a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);text-decoration:underline;font-size:14px;}
.footer .ver{
  margin-top:8px;font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);
}

.section-mywallet{margin-bottom:18px;}
&lt;/style&gt;
&lt;/head&gt;
&lt;body&gt;

  &lt;div class=&quot;topbar&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;tb-left&quot;&gt;
      &lt;button class=&quot;menu-btn&quot; aria-label=&quot;menu&quot;&gt;
        &lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2.2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M3 7h18M3 12h18M3 17h18&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;
      &lt;/button&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;brand&quot;&gt;gov&lt;span class=&quot;dot&quot;&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;gr&quot;&gt;gr&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;tb-right&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;mai-wrap&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;bot&quot;&gt;
          &lt;!-- Chat-bubble robot: cyan rounded square with face --&gt;
          &lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 40 40&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;
            &lt;!-- Antenna --&gt;
            &lt;line x1=&quot;20&quot; y1=&quot;2&quot; x2=&quot;20&quot; y2=&quot;5.5&quot; stroke=&quot;#00b2e3&quot; stroke-width=&quot;1.8&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;circle cx=&quot;20&quot; cy=&quot;2.2&quot; r=&quot;1.6&quot; fill=&quot;#00b2e3&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;!-- Side ears --&gt;
            &lt;rect x=&quot;2.5&quot; y=&quot;16&quot; width=&quot;3&quot; height=&quot;7&quot; rx=&quot;1.2&quot; fill=&quot;#00b2e3&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;rect x=&quot;34.5&quot; y=&quot;16&quot; width=&quot;3&quot; height=&quot;7&quot; rx=&quot;1.2&quot; fill=&quot;#00b2e3&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;!-- Chat bubble body (rounded square with downward tail) --&gt;
            &lt;path d=&quot;M6 11 Q6 6 11 6 L29 6 Q34 6 34 11 L34 27 Q34 32 29 32 L22 32 L17 36 L18 32 L11 32 Q6 32 6 27 Z&quot; fill=&quot;#00b2e3&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;!-- Face plate --&gt;
            &lt;rect x=&quot;10.5&quot; y=&quot;11&quot; width=&quot;19&quot; height=&quot;14&quot; rx=&quot;3&quot; fill=&quot;#fff&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;!-- Eyes --&gt;
            &lt;circle cx=&quot;15.5&quot; cy=&quot;17&quot; r=&quot;1.7&quot; fill=&quot;#00b2e3&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;circle cx=&quot;24.5&quot; cy=&quot;17&quot; r=&quot;1.7&quot; fill=&quot;#00b2e3&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;!-- Smile --&gt;
            &lt;path d=&quot;M14.5 20.5 Q20 23.5 25.5 20.5&quot; stroke=&quot;#00b2e3&quot; stroke-width=&quot;1.6&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot;/&gt;
          &lt;/svg&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;span class=&quot;mai-text&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;ai&quot;&gt;mAi&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;gov&quot;&gt;gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;button class=&quot;mail-btn&quot; aria-label=&quot;mail&quot;&gt;
        &lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; stroke-linejoin=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M4 6h16v12H4z&quot;/&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M4 6l8 7 8-7&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;
      &lt;/button&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;

  &lt;div class=&quot;carousel-wrap&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;carousel&quot; id=&quot;carousel&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;card id&quot; onclick=&quot;parent.postMessage({nav:&#x27;credentials&#x27;},&#x27;*&#x27;)&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;stripe&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;ctitle&quot;&gt;Δελτίο Ταυτότητας&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;cbody&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;cnum&quot;&gt;ΑΜ5183064&lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;cdate&quot;&gt;Ημ. Έκδοσης: 04/01/2026&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;cphoto&quot;&gt;&lt;img src=&quot;assets/images/photo1.png&quot; alt=&quot;&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;card dl&quot;&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;stripe&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;ctitle&quot;&gt;Άδεια Οδήγησης&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;cbody&quot;&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;cnum&quot;&gt;580226864&lt;/div&gt;
          &lt;div class=&quot;cdate&quot;&gt;Ισχύς μέχρι: 19/07/2039&lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;/div&gt;
        &lt;div class=&quot;cphoto&quot;&gt;&lt;img src=&quot;assets/images/photo2.png&quot; alt=&quot;&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;dots&quot; id=&quot;dots&quot;&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;dot active&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;dot&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;

  &lt;div class=&quot;field-pn&quot;&gt;
    &lt;span&gt;Προσωπικός Αριθμός&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;svg class=&quot;eye&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; stroke-linejoin=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M1 12s4-8 11-8 11 8 11 8-4 8-11 8S1 12 1 12z&quot;/&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;12&quot; cy=&quot;12&quot; r=&quot;3&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;

  &lt;div class=&quot;section-mywallet&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;sec-head&quot;&gt;
      &lt;span class=&quot;sec-title&quot;&gt;My wallet&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;a class=&quot;sec-link&quot; href=&quot;#&quot;&gt;Προβολή
        &lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2.5&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M9 6l6 6-6 6&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;
      &lt;/a&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;wallet-row&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;wallet-tile first&quot;&gt;
        &lt;img class=&quot;ticket-ic&quot; src=&quot;data:image/png;base64,&quot; alt=&quot;&quot;&gt;
        &lt;span class=&quot;tlabel&quot;&gt;Εισιτήρια&lt;/span&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;wallet-tile&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;wallet-tile&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;wallet-tile&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;wallet-spacer&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;

  &lt;div class=&quot;sec-head&quot;&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;sec-title&quot;&gt;Η θυρίδα μου&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;a class=&quot;sec-link&quot; href=&quot;#&quot;&gt;Προβολή
      &lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2.5&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M9 6l6 6-6 6&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;
    &lt;/a&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;h-scroll&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;ibcard&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;ibtitle&quot;&gt;Αυτεπάγγελτη αναζήτηση δικαιολογητικού από Δημόσιο Υπάλληλο&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;ibts&quot;&gt;02/10/2025, 11:25&lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;ibcard&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;ibtitle&quot;&gt;Παράταση συμμετοχής στην αξιολόγηση δημόσιων υπηρεσιών&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;ibts&quot;&gt;26/05/2025, 15:14&lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;ibcard&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;ibtitle&quot;&gt;Αξιολογήστε Υπηρεσίες της Δημόσιας Διοίκησης&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;ibts&quot;&gt;20/05/2025, 10:35&lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;ibcard&quot;&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;ibtitle&quot;&gt;Υπεύθυνη Δήλωση&lt;/div&gt;
      &lt;div class=&quot;ibts&quot;&gt;05/10/2025, 15:00&lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;

  &lt;div class=&quot;sec-head&quot;&gt;
    &lt;span class=&quot;sec-title&quot;&gt;Επίκαιρες υπηρεσίες&lt;/span&gt;
    &lt;a class=&quot;sec-link&quot; href=&quot;#&quot;&gt;Όλες οι υπηρεσίες
      &lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2.5&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M9 6l6 6-6 6&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;
    &lt;/a&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;div class=&quot;svc-scroll&quot;&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;svccard&quot;&gt;1. Προσωπικός Αριθμός / Επιβεβαίωση και διόρθωση στοιχείων στα μητρώα&lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;svccard&quot;&gt;2. Βεβαίωση Επιλεξιμότητας στο πρόγραμμα «Σπίτι μου ΙΙ»&lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;svccard&quot;&gt;3. Υπεύθυνη Δήλωση / Εξουσιοδότηση / Γνήσιο Υπογραφής&lt;/div&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;svccard&quot;&gt;4. Δημιουργία ηλεκτρονικού επισημειώματος της Χάγης (Apostille)&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;

  &lt;div class=&quot;footer&quot;&gt;
    &lt;a href=&quot;#&quot;&gt;Πολιτική Προστασίας Προσωπικών Δεδομένων&lt;/a&gt;
    &lt;div class=&quot;ver&quot;&gt;Έκδοση εφαρμογής : 3.2.1 (104)&lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/div&gt;

  &lt;button class=&quot;fab&quot; aria-label=&quot;add&quot;&gt;
    &lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2.5&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M12 5v14M5 12h14&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;
  &lt;/button&gt;

&lt;script&gt;
  const carousel = document.getElementById(&#x27;carousel&#x27;);
  const dots = document.querySelectorAll(&#x27;#dots .dot&#x27;);
  carousel.addEventListener(&#x27;scroll&#x27;, () =&gt; {
    const i = Math.round(carousel.scrollLeft / carousel.clientWidth);
    dots.forEach((d, k) =&gt; d.classList.toggle(&#x27;active&#x27;, k === i));
  }, { passive: true });
&lt;/script&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
